title: Kanmoodi Thirakumbothu Song Lyrics Sachein
stanzas:
Kanmoodi thirakkum podhu
kadavul edhire vandhathu pole
ada en kanmundaadi
avale vandhu nindraale

kudaiyillaa neram paarthu
kotti pogum mazhaiyai pola
azhagaale ennai nenaithu
idhuthaan kadhal endraale

therumunaiyai thaandum varaiyil
verumnaal thaan endrundhen
thevadhayai paarthadhum indru
thirunaal enkindren

azhagaana vibathil indru
ayyo naan maatikonden
thappikka vazhigal irundhum
vendaam endren
o ho ho o o ho ho...

un perum theriyaadhu
un oorum theriaadhu
azhagaana paravaikku
per vendumaa

nee ennai paarkkaamal
naan unnai paarkindren
nadhiyil vilum bimpathai
nilaa ariyumaa

uyirukkul innoru uyirai
sumakindren kadhal idhuvaa
idhayathil malaiyin edaiyai
unargindren kadhal idhuvaa

veedhi ulaa nee vandhaal
theru vilakkum kannadikkum
veedu sells sooriyanum
adam pidikkume

nadhiyodu nee kulithaal
meenukkum kaaichal varum
unnai thottu paarkathaan
mazhai kuthikkume

boogambam vandhaal kooda
patharaatha nenjam enadhu
poo ondru modhiyathaale
pattendru sarinthadhu indru

Kanmoodi thirakkum podhu
kadavul edhire vandhathu pole
ada en kanmundaadi
avale vandhu nindraale

kudaiyillaa neram paarthu
kotti pogum mazhaiyai pola
azhagaale ennai nenaithu
idhuthaan kadhal endraale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanmoodi Thirakumbothu?

The song captures the essence of romantic longing and the beauty of love.

Who composed the music for Sachein?

Devi Sri Prasad composed the music for the movie.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in a scene where the protagonist expresses his deep feelings for his love interest.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kanmoodi Thirakumbothu?

The lyrics were penned by Na Muthukumar.

When was the movie Sachein released?

The movie was released in 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kanmoodi Thirakumbothu from the movie Sachein is a romantic melody that beautifully portrays the feelings of love and longing. Set against the backdrop of a blossoming romance, the lyrics by Na Muthukumar capture the poetic essence of love. Devi Sri Prasad's soothing composition enhances the emotional depth of the song, making it a memorable piece. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, perfect for moments of reflection and romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kanmoodi Thirakumbothu from the film Sachein, where Devi Sri Prasad's soulful composition meets Na Muthukumar's poetic lyrics. This romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the soothing vibes and let the music transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: When I open my eyes, it's like God appeared in front of me, she stood right there.
Like the rain that pours without warning, she thought of me beautifully and called it love.
Until I crossed the street, I was alone, but seeing the angel today feels like a festival.
In this beautiful disaster, oh no, I'm trapped. Even though there are ways to escape, I say no.
I don't know your name or where you're from, does a beautiful bird need a name?
Without you looking at me, I am looking at you. Does the moon know the reflection in the river?
I carry another life within me, is this love? I feel the weight of a mountain in my heart, is this love?
When you walk down the street, even the streetlights and mirrors, the sun itself, will be amazed.
If you bathe in the river, even the fish will catch a cold. The rain will jump to touch and see you.
Even if an earthquake comes, my heart won't shake. But today, a flower touched me and it burst.
When I open my eyes, it's like God appeared in front of me, she stood right there.
Like the rain that pours without warning, she thought of me beautifully and called it love.
